hotels.description_en:
Historic Setting: Guesthouse Nights by Morpheus in Antwerp offers a unique stay within a historic building. The property is adults-only and highly rated for its comfortable rooms and excellent breakfast.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, air-conditioning, private bathrooms with walk-in showers, and private check-in and check-out services. Additional amenities include a terrace, balcony, and garden views.
Breakfast and Location: A continental breakfast is served each morning, featuring fresh pastries, cheese, fruits, and juice. The property is less than 1 km from Astrid Square and Antwerp Central Station, and Antwerp International Airport is 5 km away.
Couples particularly like the location รขโฌโ they rated it 8.9 for a two-person trip.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: ADA in Antwerp offers family rooms with private bathrooms, tea and coffee makers, and free WiFi. Each room includes a work desk, TV, and wardrobe, ensuring a pleasant stay.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can relax on the sun terrace or in the garden, enjoy the bar, and utilise the outdoor seating area. Additional amenities include bicycle parking, luggage storage, and paid off-site private parking.
Prime Location: Located 4 km from Antwerp International Airport, ADA is near attractions such as Rubenshuis (1 km) and Antwerp Central Station (1.7 km). De Keyserlei is a 17-minute walk away, offering easy access to the city.

hotels.name: Maison Nationale City Flats & Suites

La Maison Nationale City Flats & Suites est un รยฉtablissement moderne situรยฉ au coeur d'Anvers, รย  350 mรยจtres de la cathรยฉdrale de Notre-Dame, de la place Verte et de la Grand-Place. Dotรยฉ d'une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite, cet hรยฉbergement se caractรยฉrise par un intรยฉrieur design.

Ornรยฉs de parquet, ces logements possรยจdent รยฉgalement une salle de bains avec une baignoire et une douche, des articles de toilette gratuits et un sรยจche-cheveux.

hotels.description_en:
The modern Maison Nationale City Flats & Suites is located in the heart of Antwerp, 350 metres from the Cathedral of Our Lady, Groenplaats Square and Town Square. Fitted with free Wi-Fi access, this accommodation features design elements.
The suites come with a living room including a flat-screen TV, a minibar and an iPod docking station. Equipped with hardwood floors, the units also feature a bathroom with a bath and a shower, free toiletries and a hairdryer.
Guests can prepare meals in the suite of Maison Nationale City Flats & Suites, which is fitted with a coffee machine, an electric kettle, kitchenware, a microwave and a fridge. You can also reserve breakfast which can be taken in the suite.
Meir and Keyserlei Shopping District is 1.4 km or a 15-minute walk away.

Situata nel cuore di Anversa, a 350 metri dalla Cattedrale di Notre-Dame e dalle piazze Groenplaats e Stadsplein, la moderna Maison Nationale City Flats & Suites offre sistemazioni caratterizzate da elementi di design e dotate di Wi-Fi gratuito.

Nelle suite della Maison Nationale City Flats & Suites avrete la possibilitรย  di gustare una prima colazione disponibile su prenotazione, e potrete usufruire di attrezzature per preparare i vostri pasti, quali stoviglie, macchina da caffรยจ, bollitore elettrico, forno a microonde e frigorifero.
